Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages

Class Init

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages.Init
public final class Init extends Object
The Zenoh transport-level INIT message.

An INIT is either an Init.InitSyn (A flag = 0, sent by the initiator) or an Init.InitAck (A flag = 1, sent by the responder). They share the same on-wire layout except for the presence of the Cookie field, which is only carried when A = 1.

Wire layout (from the reference source):

  7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0
 +-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+
 |Z|S|A|   INIT  |    header byte: id=0x01 | S | A | Z
 +-+-+-+---------+
 |    version    |
 +---------------+
 |zid_len|x|x|wai|    high 4 bits = actual ZID length - 1
 +-------+-+-+---+    low  2 bits = WhatAmI (0b00 Router, 0b01 Peer, 0b10 Client)
 ~      [u8]     ~    ZID bytes
 +---------------+
 |x|x|x|x|rid|fsn| \  if S=1: sn/id resolution (bit0 = fsn, bit1 = rid,
 +---------------+  |          top bits reserved)
 |     u16 LE    |  |         then a little-endian u16 BatchSize
 |               | /
 +---------------+
 ~    <u8;zN>    ~    if A=1: Cookie (varint-length-prefixed byte string)
 +---------------+
 ~   [InitExts]  ~    if Z=1: extension chain
 +---------------+

The Z extension bit and the extension chain use the common TLV format documented on Extension.

S negotiates sequence-number / request-id resolutions and the per-batch size. The pair of 2-bit fields inside the SNI byte (fsn for frame SN, rid for request id) encode a resolution enum (0=U8, 1=U16, 2=U32, 3=U64). This publisher-only client omits S in its InitSyn (the server then uses its defaults) and ignores it on the InitAck side.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    Init.InitAck
    Immutable value carrier for the server's InitAck reply.
    static final record 
    Init.InitSyn
    Immutable value carrier for a client-side InitSyn.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    FLAG_A
    A flag: 0 = InitSyn (request), 1 = InitAck (response).
    static final int
    FLAG_S
    S flag: 1 = size params (SN resolutions + batch size) follow.
    static final int
    FLAG_Z
    Z flag: 1 = extension chain follows the rest of the fixed body.
    static final int
    ID
    Transport-message id byte for INIT.
